race.comment: FLYING FOR FUN (6) progressive mare who can tick the 1200m box today. Produced slick closing splits first-up with a commanding win over 1100m in the G3 Maurice McCarten Stakes at Rosehill. More mature now and will take holding out from the sticky gate. GANGSTA GRANNY (3) won the G3 Wenona Girl first-up at this track, then ridden a treat from the wide gate with a narrow second in the G3 Star Kingdom Stakes over 1200m at Rosehill. Nice weight drop for this and shapes as one of the main contenders. CATCH THE GLORY (4) blew them off the park first-up with her excellent fresh record for a surging win over 1200m in the G3 Birthday Card Stakes at Rosehill. Well drawn again and looks set for a bright campaign. IN FLIGHT (5) disappointed in two runs back and could be looking for the 1200m now. Got back in the run and not that far away when eighth in the G1 The Galaxy over 1100m at Rosehill. Back in grade with the key jockey change. SPLASH BACK (1) Group winning mare with a solid fresh record.
